calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-14-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Respondent/Plaintiff Edward Richkind is present.
Appellant/Defendant Mark Miller is not present this date.

The cause comes on regularly for a Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are affirmed.

Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on his own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem David Commins, Clerk Melinka Jones, Not Reported. (525)
